generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing angle encoder for measuring hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer for wind speed measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateData
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at end of hoist for container pickup"
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor data acquisition and hardware control"
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stored in TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, ContinuousValidationService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Gantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "gantrylib Python module for data logging and transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, TrajectoryGenerationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architecture visualization"
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryGenerated
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAvailable
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualization
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThresholdBreachNotification
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResults
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualizations showing trajectory traces with simulation confidence bounds"
]

instance ThresholdBreachNotification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operator notifications for threshold breaches during continuous validation, enabling informed decisions on system health"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerated : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generated for container movement"
]

instance SimulationResults : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Crane dynamics simulation results"
]

instance HistoricalDataAvailable : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data available for analysis"
]

instance DarTwinEvolution : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "DarTwin evolution notation for digital twin evolution"
]

instance HarborSystemIntegration : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Harbor system integration for digital twin"
]

instance CapellaModelsMBSE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Capella models for MBSE lectures"
]

instance PhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, ArduinoMicrocontroller
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains TrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService, TimescaleDB, MQTTBroker, Gantrylib, DockerContainerization, Grafana, C4Model, DarTwinEvolution, HarborSystemIntegration, CapellaModelsMBSE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., movement trajectories generated by Trajectory Generator Service) sent via MQTT to the Physical Crane Interface, which controls the motors and electromagnet."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data logging and validation; trajectory generation and validation occur in near real-time during operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system where physical crane interacts with Python-based control and logging applications, which communicate via MQTT broker to a TimescaleDB database and Grafana dashboard; services like trajectory generation and validation run on the same system."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; used for monitoring, control, and continuous validation during operational lifecycle stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements with simulated trajectories, calculating distance metrics and comparing against acceptable thresholds; model validation techniques reused from prior research to ensure fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol via Eclipse Mosquitto broker for communication between physical and virtual components; data logging to TimescaleDB via Python applications."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer using Docker Compose for containerized services (TimescaleDB, Mosquitto, Grafana); gantrylib Python module installed via pip for control and logging applications."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "No specific standards followed; ad-hoc implementation using general open-source technologies (e.g., MQTT, PostgreSQL, Grafana) without adherence to formal digital twin standards."
]
